description: Captures, structures, and indexes domain knowledge artifacts including decisions, precedents, rationale records, and institutional memory entries. Provides queryable domain knowledge to other modules and workflow consumers.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models or envelope schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Frequency allocation data and band metadata — that belongs to domain_modules.allocation_intelligence
Interference study logic — that belongs to domain_modules.interference_assistant
Lifecycle enforcement — that belongs to the control_plane
Workflow orchestration — that belongs to orchestration.pipeline
